The reaction products were detected in Ilford
K-0 nuclear emulsions for the tritons and Ilford
K-1 nuclear emulsions for the alpha-particles.
Cross section normalization was obtained through
comparison of the measured yield of elastically
scattered particles to the elastic scattering cross
The target thickness was approx. 50 mug/cm**2, the
isotopic composition being 87% Ce-142 and 13% Ce-140.
The uncertainties in the relative cross sections are
generally smaller and of statistical nature only.
ranged from +-3 keV for the lowest levels to +-9 keV
